doc.name: Create DNS Record
doc.description: Create a new DNS record in a Cloudflare zone. Supports A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, NS, SRV, CAA record types. zone_id is required.

params.label: Zone ID
params.description: Cloudflare Zone ID. Falls back to provider zone_id if not specified.

params.label: Record Type
params.description: DNS record type

params.label: Name
params.description: DNS record name (e.g. example.com, sub.example.com, @ for root)

params.label: Content
params.description: Record content: IP address for A/AAAA, hostname for CNAME/MX/NS, text string for TXT

params.label: TTL
params.description: Time to live in seconds. 1 = automatic (Cloudflare-managed TTL for proxied records)

params.label: Proxied
params.description: Route traffic through Cloudflare (orange cloud). Only for A, AAAA, CNAME.

params.label: Priority
params.description: Record priority — required for MX and SRV. Lower = higher priority.

params.label: Comment
params.description: Optional free-text comment for the DNS record

params.label: Tags
params.description: Custom tags for filtering and organizing DNS records

doc.name: List Zones
doc.description: List all Cloudflare zones accessible by the API token. Returns zone id, name, status, and nameservers.

params.label: Per Page
params.description: Results per page (max 50)

params.label: Page
params.description: Page number for pagination

params.label: Zone Name
params.description: Filter by zone name (exact match, e.g. example.com)

params.label: Status
params.description: Filter by zone status

doc.name: Update DNS Record
doc.description: Update an existing DNS record in a Cloudflare zone by record ID. Uses PATCH — only provided fields are updated.

params.label: Zone ID
params.description: Cloudflare Zone ID containing the record.

params.label: Record ID
params.description: DNS Record ID to update (from Cloudflare API response or act:cf-list-dns-records)

params.label: Record Type
params.description: New DNS record type (if changing)

params.label: Name
params.description: New DNS record name (if changing)

params.label: Content
params.description: New record content (if changing)

params.label: TTL
params.description: New time to live in seconds (if changing). 1 = automatic.

params.label: Proxied
params.description: Toggle Cloudflare proxy (if changing). Only for A, AAAA, CNAME.

params.label: Priority
params.description: MX/SRV priority (if changing)

params.label: Comment
params.description: Record comment (if changing)

params.label: Tags
params.description: Custom tags (if changing)

doc.name: Create Server
doc.description: Create a new CloudWM cloud server. Returns a job command ID — poll status to get the server ID once provisioned.

params.label: Server Name
params.description: Hostname/display name for the server

params.label: Datacenter
params.description: Datacenter code (e.g. EU, IL, US-NY2)

params.label: Image
params.description: OS image ID (use /service/servers/images to list available images)

params.label: CPU Type
params.description: CPU type code (e.g. B for burstable, D for dedicated)

params.label: RAM (MB)
params.description: RAM in megabytes (e.g. 1024, 2048, 4096)

params.label: Disk Size (GB)
params.description: Primary disk size in GB

params.label: Root Password
params.description: Root/admin password for the new server

params.label: Network
params.description: Network configuration name (e.g. wan)

params.label: Daily Backup
params.description: Enable daily automated backup

doc.name: List Servers
doc.description: List all CloudWM servers in the account. Returns server name, datacenter, status, CPU, RAM, and IP addresses.

params.label: Datacenter
params.description: Filter by datacenter code (e.g. EU, IL, US-NY2)

doc.name: Power Off Server
doc.description: Power off a running CloudWM server by server name. Hard powers down the VM. Returns a command ID.

params.label: Server Name
params.description: Name of the server to power off

doc.name: Power On Server
doc.description: Power on a stopped CloudWM server by server name. Returns a command ID.

params.label: Server Name
params.description: Name of the server to power on

doc.name: merge_into
doc.description: Merge this object into a target object, or migrate all objects of this class to a target class.

params.description: Target class to merge into
Target object ID (for object merge)

doc.name: sync_genesis
doc.description: Write class definition back to its genesis file.

doc.name: login
doc.description: Authenticate user via auth-service. Returns JWT token.

doc.name: me
doc.description: Resolve current user from JWT. Find or create @user object.

doc.name: validate_keys
doc.description: Scan all objects and validate unique key constraints. Reports violations.

doc.name: CloudWM
doc.description: CloudWM (Kamatera) API provider instance. Manages cloud servers — list, create, power on/off. Configure auth with CWM_CLIENTID and CWM_SECRET environment variables.

auth._note: Set CWM_CLIENTID and CWM_SECRET environment variables with your CloudWM API credentials.
